creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Danilo G. Baio from comment #9)

A guess: things will improve with date-based naming of builds. 

<https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy8/jail.html?mastername=142amd64-default> has a single yellow highlight at the foot of the list: 

2025-05-23_14h03m54s

That's the most recent.
